headline: Targa Resources Corp. Declares Increase to Quarterly Common Dividend and Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Webcast
summary: HOUSTON, April 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) ("Targa" or the "Company") announced today that its board of directors has declared an increase to its quarterly cash dividend to $1.25 per common share, or $5.00 per common share on an annualized basis, for the first quarter of 2026, consistent with previously disclosed expectations. headline: Targa Resources (TRGP) Price Target Raised at Scotiabank, ‘Outperform’ Rating Maintained
summary: Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE:TRGP) is included among the 14 Best Infrastructure Stocks to Buy Now. Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE:TRGP) is a leading provider of midstream services and is one of the largest independent infrastructure companies in North America.
